title: Defra privacy notice: regulation of precision bred organisms
body: "This privacy notice explains how:    we will handle personal data we receive when processing precision breeding release and marketing notices   this information will be treated when fulfilling our statutory requirement to establish and maintain a precision breeding register, in accordance with the Genetic Technology (Precision Breeding) Act 2023 and the Genetic Technology (Precision Breeding) Regulations 2025    If you have any queries about the content of this privacy notice, please email genetictechnologies@defra.gov.uk. "
